Transformers: More Than Meets the Eye
is Elliot Eismin’s first pinball machine as lead designer and the first machine to be based on the original G1 incarnation of the
Transformers
franchise. The machine features a unique layout with shots that don’t quite send the ball where you’d expect and an emphasis on high-risk, high-reward scoring.

Layout:

Skill Shots:

Short plunge the ball to the upper flipper, then hit either Optimus or the upper loop to score a skill shot.

Main Modes:

In the search for Energon, the Autobots and Decepticons have crash landed on Earth. 4 million years later, the robots have reawakened. The Decepticons plan to pillage Earth’s energy sources, while the Autobots must protect the new world they have been sent to at all costs.

Transformers: More Than Meets the Eye
features two sets of main modes, which can both run at the same time and brought into
multiball
modes as described below if a mode is started before the multiball.
sections.Missions, Energon & Cosmic Rust::
Complete the drop targets in front of Megatron, then shoot the scoop behind them to start the currently flashing mission. There are five different missions to play through, timed for 60 seconds, that light different shots on the playfield for progress, with a final blow available if the player makes enough lit shots. Increase the final blow by hitting Megatron’s scoop at any time in the mission (so long as it isn’t currently lit).

If the player fails a mission by draining before time runs out, or failing to complete the required shots in time, their progress will be saved the next time the mission starts.

Shooting the
spinner
fills up the Energon cube on the display. Once the cube is full, the next mission started will be easier to complete but score less. Completing a mission without Energon will apply cosmic rust to the next mission, which makes it more difficult to complete but score more per shot.

The five missions are:

Autobot Run
: Help the Autobots win a charity race. Make five blue shots to light the final blow. Shooting quickly flashing blue shots scores 3x.
Microbots
:
Solar Needle
: Deactivate the solar needle by hitting the lit blue standup targets to light the captive ball, while avoiding red targets that reset progress. Make 3 lit captive balls to light the final blow.
Prime Target
:
Golden Lagoon
:
sections.Dinobot Missions::
Shoot the Grimlock targets to light the left orbit to start a Dinobot Mission.

Multiballs:
sections.Transformers Multiball::
Shoot Optimus to light lock at the center VUK. If lock is already lit, further Optimus shots will increase the jackpot value for the multiball by 250k.

Lock 3 balls to start Transformers Multiball.
sections.Combiner Multiball::
Earn Combiner parts by shooting the side ramp after having collected enough
tech spec
parts. Collect enough Combiner parts to light Combiner Multiball.

Other Scoring:
sections.Autobot Hurry-Up:: Light the left inlane to light this hurry-up after completing the Megatron drop targets.
sections.Starscream Frenzy:: Light the right inlane to light this mode after completing the Megatron drop targets.
sections.Tech Specs / Tech Spec Mania::
Shoot the standup targets near major shots to light the shots near them for Tech Specs. There are two colors of tech spec: red (Autobot) and purple (Decepticon).

Collect 3 tech specs of each color to light Tech Spec Mania.
sections.Bumblebee Double Scoring:: Shoot the captive ball to add letters to BUMBLEBEE. Complete his name to start 30 seconds of 2x scoring. Spell BUMBLEBEE again while the multiplier is active to start 30 seconds of 3x scoring.
